ugc.title: PAN Furnitures, in real life
ugc.subtitle: USE #PANFURNITURES AND TAG US @PANFURNITURES
ugc.caption:
A little look at how our pieces are living in your homes ✨

Different styles, different spaces, but one thing stays the same — furniture that feels like you.

items.q: How much do you charge for shipping?
items.a: Shipping is free on all orders — no minimum, no surprises at checkout.

items.q: How long will it take for my order to arrive?
items.a: In-stock items ship within 3–5 business days and typically arrive within 1–2 weeks.

items.q: Do you offer a price guarantee?
items.a: Yes. If you find the same item for less within 30 days of purchase, we'll match the price.

items.q: What kind of warranty is provided on your products?
items.a: Every piece includes a multi-year warranty covering manufacturing defects in frames, materials, and workmanship.
Live with it for up to 100 days. Not in love? We'll pick it up for free and refund you in full.
Yes — 0% APR financing is available for 12 and 24 months through our checkout partners.

items.name: Marinella Guda
items.text: The quality of their products is top-notch, especially for the price. They just need to improve their customer response time. Though it’s understandable that they’re dealing with an influx of inquiries, I think hiring more page managers would really help.

items.name: Joan Moje
items.text: We are very happy with the bed frame we purchased! It is sturdy, well-made, and has a beautiful design. It was easy to assemble and looks perfect in our bedroom. The quality exceeded our expectations, and it is definitely worth the price. Highly recommended to anyone looking for a durable and stylish bed frame! A great purchase and an excellent addition to our home!

items.name: Andrea May Magcayang
items.text:
I really like how my bed frame turned out
it’s simple but still feels clean and elegant. The soft upholstered finish gives it a cozy vibe, and I like how the headboard is padded, especially when I just want to sit back and relax. The neutral color was a good choice too since it makes everything look bright and easy to style.
I’m happy with it overall it feels comfortable, looks neat, and it’s a good base that I can slowly style the way I want.

items.name: Artemus Angeles
items.text: Got the 15k promo beds from them. They are sturdy. They used hardwood supports and good plywood for the bed. The braces and the support are 1x1”s or 2x2”s im not sure but they were straight and solid and treated wood pa. The foam is thick and feels firm to the touch. Tamang tama lang. Its actually much bigger in person than in the reels and pics. Mukhang hindi 15k talaga. Very happy with my purchase!

Got my customized bed that is so durable and looks good with my room's interior!

Great customer service and excellent product!

items.name: Joel Gambala
items.text:
We recently bought two bed frames from your store, and we’re very pleased with our purchase!

Quality & Construction
The frames feel sturdy and well-built, with solid materials that don’t squeak or wobble even with regular use. The finish is smooth and looks exactly as shown on your website.

Value
Compared to other options we looked at, these frames offer great value for money. They provide excellent support for our mattresses and have enough under-bed storage space to keep our bedroom tidy.

The delivery was also on time, and the staff we spoke with when placing our order were friendly and helpful. We’d definitely recommend these bed frames to family and friends!

items.name: Bennieson Co
items.text: Responsive, good quality, reasonable price. Shout out to Ms. Aina!

items.name: Shiela ann Ualat
items.text:
The quality of the products met expectations—what is shown in the ads accurately reflects how they look in person. The furniture is visually pleasing, and the delivery team handled the items carefully and remained courteous throughout the process.

However, communication through the online messenger needs significant improvement. Order updates and requests were not provided unless we followed up, and our delivery was cancelled or rescheduled twice without clear explanation. The first cancellation was not communicated to us at all, and even on the final delivery day, no update was given until I personally reached out to one of the delivery personnel, who was helpful and responsive despite not being assigned to our delivery.

While I would still recommend the good quality of your products, client inquiries should be handled more attentively and proactively. A business is not defined solely by how well its products are advertised, but also by the consistency, clarity, and professionalism shown in how customers are treated.
